_publications._publicationTitle: Murine models of IDH-wild-type glioblastoma exhibit spatial segregation of tumor initiation and manifestation during evolution.

_contextSnippet: Rictor deletion completely eliminated multifocal tumors in p53 ∆E5–6 Rictor ∆/∆ CKO mice, compared to all three p53 CKO models that exhibited a similar incidence of brains with multifocal tumors
details: Rictor deletion completely eliminated multifocal tumors and resulted in tumors directly associated with the SVZ
